plugins.name: agentex
plugins.description: Agentic QA — skip the manual grind. AgenTeX plans and runs your tests for you (human-in-the-loop or fully autonomous) with structured evidence and a consolidated defect report, driving a real browser via playwright-cli. Also estimates QA effort for Azure DevOps sprint stories and creates [Testing] tasks on them, and reaches Azure resources mid-run via the az CLI. API & DB execution targets coming soon.
